{{Quote|Or you may allow me to have it. I think it is adorable. You would not be troubled with it, and I would make it worth your while.|Cnorec|<ref name="The Crystal Star">''[[The Crystal Star]]''</ref>}}
'''[[Lord/Legends|Lord]] Cnorec''' was a member of the [[Empire Reborn]] which was led by the [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Hethrir]], the former [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Procurator of Justice]]. He was rich and powerful, owning vast resources including [[Starship/Legends|starships]] and having several followers.

==Biography==
During a meeting with [[Lord/Legends|Lord]] Hethrir in [[14 ABY/Legends|14 ABY]], Cnorec was present along with Lord [[Qaqquqqu]] and Lady [[Ucce]]. He suggested that he have the then three-[[Standard year/Legends|year]]-old [[Anakin Solo]] because he found the boy adorable and that Hethrir would not be troubled with it since he would make it worth Hethrir's while. However, Hethrir replied by saying that he would keep Anakin since he wanted to sacrifice him to [[Waru]] at [[Crseih Station]].

Later, when he disagreed with Hethrir over the large amount of the captive children to be auctioned, Hethrir [[Telekinesis/Legends#Force Choke|choked]] him to [[Death/Legends|death]] using [[The Force/Legends|The Force]]. His body was then carried out of the room by two [[Proctor (Empire Reborn)|Proctors]].
